# Chromie

> Chromie is an AI-powered no-code Chrome extension builder that turns natural language prompts into working Chrome extensions.

Chromie lets you describe what you want in plain English and get a complete Chrome extension — manifest, background script, content scripts, popup, options page, and more. You can test extensions in a simulated browser, export to GitHub, and publish to the Chrome Web Store.

Key capabilities:
- Natural language to extension: describe your idea and get production-ready code
- In-browser testing: run and debug extensions without leaving the app
- AI-assisted testing: automated Puppeteer tests for your extension
- Export to GitHub: one-click export of your project
- Chrome Web Store deployment: walkthrough for publishing, with generated content for branding, permissions, etc.

## Main

- [Chromie Home](https://chromie.dev): Landing page and product overview
- [Builder](https://chromie.dev/builder): Create and edit extensions with the AI builder
- [Blog](https://chromie.dev/blog): Product updates and Chrome extension development tips
- [Pricing](https://chromie.dev#pricing): Plans and credit usage

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://chromie.dev/privacy-policy): Chromie's privacy practices
- [Profile](https://chromie.dev/profile): User account and billing management
